description: Talk-pane perf investigation, remaining items. talk-clear-pending-on-jsonl-match has been refined twice and still has intermittent repro; latest tweak normalizes whitespace on both sides of the match. talk-scroll-on-pending-appear is new and not yet exercised.

items.before: The optimistic 'You' card (pendingUserText) is cleared by a ChangeListener on turns.length (Talk.xmlui:43-45). Race: when STT latency lets some unrelated JSONL write bump turns.length BEFORE handleVoiceTranscript sets pendingUserText, the listener fires for that bump (no-op, pendingUserText is empty), then pendingUserText gets set, and nothing future fires the listener until the NEXT turn arrives. Result: duplicate 'You' card persists in the UI — top is the real turn, bottom is the stuck optimistic copy. Reproduced multiple times this session with screenshots.
items.after: Replaced the turns.length listener with one keyed on lastJsonl that calls a helper pendingMatchesTurn(turns, pendingUserText) (added to Globals.xs). The listener handler computes sessionTurns(c.newValue) inline so it doesn't rely on the reactive `turns` var being up-to-date when it fires. Added a display-side guard on the optimistic VStack's `when` so it hides immediately if a matching turn is present, even before pendingUserText clears. Matcher normalizes whitespace on both sides since toTurn() collapses /\s+/g before submitting. Diagnostic pendingMatch logs left in for ongoing intermittent repro. Bug needs more verification — has 'worked' on a test only to reappear later. Strip diagnostics before commit.

items.before: When the approval menu (pendingPoll.value.pending) appears below the last turn, the Talk pane doesn't scroll to keep the menu in view — content has grown but the existing scroll-to-bottom listener only fires on turns.length changes (Talk.xmlui:27-29). User has to manually scroll down to see / interact with the new menu.
items.after: Added a ChangeListener keyed on pendingPoll.value && pendingPoll.value.pending && pendingPoll.value.pending.id that calls window.scrollAllToBottom() when the pending tool id changes. Guarded with window.wasPinnedToBottom() so manual scroll-up isn't yanked back. Separate listener from the existing turns.length / pendingUserText scroll triggers.
